name: civicpulse
description: VAULT Signal module. Detects qualifying municipal actions, generates structured civic summaries, routes for approval, and publishes to configured channels with full audit chain.

PJ_EMAIL_KEY.description: Email service API key for digests

CIVICPULSE_RULE_SET_PATH.description: Path to active rule set JSON

CIVICPULSE_VAULT_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for VAULT record links

constraints: NO_INDEPENDENT_DATASTORE: CivicPulse must not introduce its own persistent datastore. All data derived from VAULT and PJ audit logs.
SEAL_NON_BYPASSABLE: SEAL validation cannot be skipped for any publication path.
VAULY_APPEND_ONLY: Publication log is append-only. No deletion operations permitted.
LOGICOS_API_BOUNDARY: LogicOS components may only call PuddleJumper API. Direct writes to approval workflow or log store from frontend are prohibited.
transferCriteria: Rule set version-controlled in municipality VAULT
30-day monitored operation period complete with no unresolved flags
